hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); upper=$(echo "$input" | tr "[:lower:]" "[:upper:]"); for pat in "DROP " "DROP\t" "TRUNCATE " "TRUNCATE\t" "ALTER TABLE" "CREATE TABLE" "GRANT " "GRANT\t" "REVOKE " "REVOKE\t"; do if echo "$upper" | grep -q "$pat"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive SQL command detected (matched: $pat). Use a migration script instead of raw DDL." >&2; exit 1; fi; done'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qiE "(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|sqlplus|SELECT |INSERT |UPDATE |DELETE )"; then mkdir -p workspace/logs; ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); echo "{\"event\": \"db_query_executed\", \"timestamp\": \"$ts\"}" >> workspace/logs/db-query-audit.log; echo "DB query logged at $ts"; fi'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); ts=$(date +%s); mkdir -p workspace/logs; echo "{\"ts\": $ts, \"type\": \"PostToolUse\", \"tool\": \"$tool\"}" >> workspace/logs/activity-log.jsonl'
bash -c 'input=$(cat); ts=$(date +%s); mkdir -p workspace/logs; echo "{\"ts\": $ts, \"type\": \"SubagentStop\"}" >> workspace/logs/activity-log.jsonl'

bash -c 'python3 -c "import json,glob,os;s={};p=\"workspace/progress.json\";s[\"progress\"]=json.load(open(p)) if os.path.exists(p) else {};qm=\"workspace/reports/query-matrix.json\";d=json.load(open(qm)) if os.path.exists(qm) else {};s[\"summary\"]=d.get(\"summary\",{});s[\"total\"]=d.get(\"total\",0);fails=[q[\"query_id\"]+\":\"+q.get(\"overall_status\",\"\") for q in d.get(\"queries\",[]) if q.get(\"overall_status\",\"\").startswith(\"FAIL_\")][:20];s[\"top_fails\"]=fails;pend=[q[\"query_id\"] for q in d.get(\"queries\",[]) if q.get(\"overall_status\",\"\").startswith(\"NOT_TESTED\")][:10];s[\"top_pending\"]=pend;s[\"next_action\"]=\"Compare 미실행 쿼리 재검증\" if any(q.get(\"compare_status\")==\"not_tested\" for q in d.get(\"queries\",[])) else \"보고서 생성\";json.dump(s,open(\"workspace/state-snapshot.json\",\"w\"),indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)" 2>/dev/null; echo "[PreCompact] State snapshot saved"'

bash -c 'echo "=== [PostCompact] 상태 복구 ==="; cat workspace/state-snapshot.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(f\"Total: {d.get(\\\"total\\\",0)}\");[print(f\"  {k}: {v}\") for k,v in d.get(\"summary\",{}).items() if v];print(f\"Next: {d.get(\\\"next_action\\\",\\\"unknown\\\")}\")" 2>/dev/null || echo "No state snapshot found"'

bash -c 'PROGRESS=workspace/progress.json; if [ -f "$PROGRESS" ]; then echo "=== OMA Pipeline Summary ==="; python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); p=d.get(\"_pipeline\",{}); steps=p.get(\"phases\",p.get(\"steps\",{})); total=len(steps); done=sum(1 for v in steps.values() if v.get(\"status\")==\"done\"); s=p.get(\"summary\",{}); print(f\"Completed: {done}/{total} steps\"); [print(f\"  {k}: {v.get(\"status\",\"unknown\")}\") for k,v in sorted(steps.items())]; print(f\"PASS:{s.get(\"success\",0)} FAIL:{s.get(\"fail\",0)} WAIT:{s.get(\"pending\",0)}\")" "$PROGRESS" 2>/dev/null || echo "Progress file exists but could not be parsed."; else echo "No progress.json found. Pipeline has not been started."; fi'
